raw.message:
New Customer Offer: Get up to 500 Free Spins when you deposit £10!
Plus, why not check out Prize Matcher? It's our free daily game where you can win Cash, Free Spins or Golden Chips!
18 | GambleAware.Org | T&Cs apply.

hook.summary: High-impact announcement of a 500 free spins welcome offer.
hook.visual_action: Dynamic gold and white text zooms in over a signature green background with a glowing neon line.
hook.text_overlay: bet365 NEW CUSTOMER OFFER GET UP TO 500 FREE SPINS WHEN YOU DEPOSIT £10
hook.voiceover_transcript: New bet365 customers can get up to 500 free spins when you deposit £10.

scene_flow: Introduction of the 500 free spins offer for new customers.
Transition to a 3D grid environment showcasing the 'Prize Matcher' game.
Neon slot symbols fly towards the viewer to demonstrate gameplay variety.
Highlighting the 'Free to Play Every Day' feature with a grid of rewards.
audience_proxy: Adults in the UK interested in online casino gaming and high-value promotional sign-up offers.
